scripts.build: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/adventures.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('public/adventures.manifest.json','utf8'))"
scripts.sync:public: cp prototype/index.html prototype/styles.css prototype/app.js prototype/adventures.js prototype/adventures.manifest.json prototype/manifest.webmanifest prototype/sw.js public/ && mkdir -p public/assets/icons && cp -a prototype/assets/icons/. public/assets/icons/
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/adventures.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('public/adventures.manifest.json','utf8'))" && node --check scripts/generate-audio.js && node --check scripts/check-audio-coverage.js && node scripts/check-audio-coverage.js
